narrative:
Rockland East (precinct in Washington County) has 626 registered voters, with 58.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.9 percentage points.
